title: taraxacum haareanum
intro: Taraxacum haareanum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant within the dandelion genus. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a bitter and diuretic agent, helping to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of liver and gallbladder issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum haareanum include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and aiding in the removal of toxins from the body. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum haareanum include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall digestive health and well-being.
